mapper.select: SELECT so.*, u.real_name as cashier_name, m.name as member_name, m.card_no FROM sales_order so LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON so.cashier_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN member_info m ON so.member_id = m.member_id WHERE so.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT DATE(order_time) as stat_date, COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(total_num) as total_num, SUM(pay_amount) as total_amount FROM sales_order WHERE order_time >= #{startDate} AND order_time <= #{endDate} AND status = '已完成' GROUP BY DATE(order_time) ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT si.drug_id, d.drug_name, SUM(si.sale_num) as total_num, SUM(si.sale_num * si.sale_price) as total_amount FROM sales_item si LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON si.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN sales_order so ON si.order_id = so.order_id WHERE so.order_time >= #{startDate} AND so.order_time <= #{endDate} AND so.status = '已完成' GROUP BY si.drug_id, d.drug_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC
